chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S-216 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.660/2024 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.661/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 19-5-2025 On 27.01.2025, following order was passed:- “None present, same was the position on the last date. By way of sheer indulgence adjourned to 10.03.2025. Meanwhile, office is directed to issue notice to petitioner and intimation notice to his counsel for the said date.” Today is also the same position none present for the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received, which shows that the petitioner is not interested to proceed with the matter. As a result thereof, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Naveed Ali
